overall.description: Static shot of a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment bedroom from a video game, likely Cyberpunk 2077. The scene features a messy bed in the foreground, checkered wall tiles, and moody artificial lighting with green neon accents. No camera movement or action occurs throughout the entire clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with sleeping area

agents.ego_description: stationary in the apartment, observing the dimly lit bedroom without movement

entered.detail: Unmade bed with crumpled white sheets and blankets in the immediate foreground
Dark checkered acoustic tiles covering the left wall
Tall wooden ladder-style shelving unit against the checkered wall
Long green neon light fixture mounted on the ceiling
Small boxy electronic device with glowing orange elements, possibly a heater
Rectangular ceiling light panel emitting warm white light

segments.scene_description: A completely static view of a cyberpunk-style apartment bedroom. The camera remains fixed on an unmade bed in the foreground, with checkered wall tiles and a wooden ladder shelf visible to the left. Green neon ceiling lights and a small electronic device provide the only illumination in the dim, moody space. No movement or changes occur throughout the segment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a completely static perspective of a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment bedroom that remains frozen in a moody, atmospheric state. It begins with a fixed view of an unmade bed in the foreground, framed by checkered wall tiles and a wooden ladder shelf to the left. As the camera lingers, the dim environment is defined by the steady glow of green neon ceiling lights and a small electronic device. The scene remains unchanging, preserving the stillness of the cluttered space without any shift in lighting or movement.
